summary: On the night before Gaokao, a citywide blackout pulls students, families, teachers, hotels, traffic control, repair crews, and education officials into emergency order-making.

downloads.label: Playable Experiment Pack
downloads.description: Scenario setup only; excludes replay history and local runtime state.

en.summary: On the night before Gaokao, a citywide blackout pulls students, families, teachers, hotels, traffic control, repair crews, and education officials into emergency order-making.

zh.summary: 高考前一晚城市大停电，学生、家长、老师、酒店、交通系统和社交媒体重建临时秩序。
